text:
byDelilah Gray

Trending News Editor

It seems like every celebrity has attended the 2024Olympics, and now,Eva MendesandRyan Goslinghave just made an ultra-rare appearance alongside their kids.

In photos obtained byDailyMailon Aug 4, we can see the family of four at the Summer Olympics, watching the women’s uneven bars final.

The pair were seen in dark glasses and casual attire, with their two young daughters sitting next to them. (Their faces are blurred in all the photos, as to ensure their privacy!) But it’s so sweet to seeMendes and Gosling making anultra-rare public appearance together, and evenwith their kiddos!Related storyMichelle Williams Gets Candid About Her ‘Horrible’ Experience Filming 'Blue Valentine' With Ryan Gosling

This is their first public appearance together in years, by the way. They were on the red carpet togther back in 2012, and were seen at Tao Restaurant in 2017; and now, at the Olympics!

For those who don’t know,Mendes and Goslingwere originally friends before their romance heated up on the set of the filmThe Place Beyond the Pines, in 2012.

They’ve been together ever since and have since welcomed two daughters named Esmerelda Amada, born on Sept. 12, 2014 , and Amada, born on April 29, 2016. (For those who don’t know, “Amada” means love, and it was Mendes’ grandmother’s name, and it’s Cuban tradition to have similar names, perThe List.)

In a previous interview withPeoplein 2019, Mendes said she finds her kids “inspiring” because of their creativity. “They’ll just be like, ‘Can I wear socks on my hands today?’ And I’m like, ‘Yes, of course you can wear socks on your hands today.’ So we make that happen.”

Before you go, clickhereto see all the celebrity couples who met on set.

title: Eva Mendes and Ryan Gosling Attend 2024 Olympics with Kids: Rare Photo
author: Delilah Gray
description: Eva Mendes and Ryan Gosling make a rare appearance at the 2024 Olympics, accompanied by their two daughters. See the sweet family moment.
